title: gongylocarpus rubricaulis
intro: Gongylocarpus rubricaulis, also known as Red-stemmed Gynura, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical forests of Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Gongylocarpus rubricaulis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing anxiety, and improving respiratory health.
